features: Colgate sensitive toothbrush has densely tufted ultra-soft bristles that are gentle on your teeth and gums thereby providing superior gentle cleaning to your teeth
Its flexible neck joint helps reduce pressure on gums and the enhanced rubber thumb grip handle gives a better grip for improved brushing control
The ultra soft bristles take care of sensitive teeth and gums, especially designed for a thorough gentle cleaning
Colgate is the number 1 toothbrush brand recommended by dentists in India
description: Product Description Directions Use the toothbrush gently for superior cleaning. Avoid pressing too hard to reduce pressure on gums. Directions Use the toothbrush gently for superior cleaning. Avoid pressing too hard to reduce pressure on gums. Safety Warning May contain small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years. Do not use for purposes other than oral hygiene. Replace every 3-4 months or sooner if bristles become frayed. See more
